# desec_zonefile (Data Source)

Exports a deSEC DNS zone as a zonefile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Export a domain as a zonefile
data "desec_zonefile" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The domain name to export.

### Read-Only

- `zonefile` (String) The zonefile content.
